get.description:
Retrieves the list of CRM profiles with metadata.

**Scopes:**
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.all
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.read

custom.description: Indicates if the profile is custom.

parent_permissions.description: Parent permissions applicable to this permission.

count.description: Count of profiles in the response.

post.description:
Creates a clone of the specified profile.

**Scopes:**
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.all
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.read

requestBody.description: Profiles to be created from the clone operation.

profiles.description: Profile to create from the clone profile.

description.description: Optional description for the new profile.

oneOf.description: The profile id in the request path is invalid or points to a deleted resource.
Request body is missing mandatory fields for cloning.
Cloned profile name conflicts with an existing profile name.
Cloned profile name contains disallowed characters.
Profile cannot be cloned due to business rules.

put.description:
Updates an existing CRM profile by ID.

**Scopes:**
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.all
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.read

requestBody.description: Payload containing profiles to be updated, including permission enablement changes.

permissions_details.description: Permission enablement entries to update for this profile.

enabled.description: Whether the permission is enabled for the profile.

200.description: Profile updated successfully, including permission changes.

details.description: Additional details about the update operation.

oneOf.description: Duplicate profile name in update request.
Profile name contains disallowed special characters.
Child permission cannot be enabled when parent permission is disabled.
A permission id in permissions cannot be updated.

get.description:
Retrieves the details of a specific CRM profile by ID.

**Scopes:**
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.all
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.read

custom.description: Indicates if the profile is custom.

module.description: Module associated with this permission. Null when the permission is not tied to a specific module.

oneOf.description: No module association for this permission.

parent_permissions.description: Parent permissions for this permission. Null when there are no parent permissions.

delete.description:
Deletes an existing CRM profile by ID.

**Scopes:**
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.all
* ZohoCRM.settings.profiles.delete

parameters.name: transfer_to_id
parameters.description: Profile ID to which users of the deleted profile will be transferred.

details.description: Additional details about the delete operation.

oneOf.description: Deletion is not permitted for this profile due to business rules.
HTTP method is not supported for this endpoint.
The profile id in the request path is invalid or already deleted.

IncludeTypes.name: include_types
IncludeTypes.description: Comma-separated list to include additional profile types along with Administrator, Standard, and all custom profiles.

schema.description: Allowed values (case-sensitive): Lite, Support. Use commas to include multiple.

Filters.name: filters
Filters.description: JSON-encoded filters to apply when listing profiles.

Id.description: Unique identifier (64-bit integer represented as string)

ProfilePermissionModule.description: Module reference used within a profile permission detail.

ApiName.description: API name of the profile. API identifier using alphanumeric characters and underscores, must start with a letter

UserReference.description: Reference to a user who performed an action

oneOf.description: User who last modified the profile

Timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset when the profile action was performed. (e.g., 2024-05-17T09:15:56+05:30)

InvalidUrlPatternErrorResponse.description: Error response for invalid URL patterns.

code.description: Error code indicating invalid URL pattern

details.description: Additional details about the URL error

status.description: Status of the response, always 'error' for error responses

PermissionErrorResponse.description: Error response when user lacks permission to perform the operation.

permissions.description: List of permissions required to perform this operation.

InvalidRequestMethodError.description: Error when HTTP method is not supported.

InvalidIdError.description: Error when the profile ID is invalid or deleted.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path segment containing the invalid id.

TransferToIdNotFoundError.description: Error when transfer_to_id is mandatory but missing.

InvalidTransferToIdError.description: Error when provided transfer_to_id is invalid or deleted.

InvalidDeleteRequestError.description: Error when profile deletion is not allowed.

MandatoryNotFoundProfileError.description: Per-profile validation error for missing mandatory fields.

json_path.description: JSON path to the invalid field.
JSON path to the duplicate field.

group_operator.description: Logical operator applied between grouped conditions.

field.description: Field to apply the condition on.

CloneProfileResponse.description: Response returned after cloning a profile.

profiles.description: List containing the clone action result (single-item array).

CloneProfileActionResponse.description: Action response for clone profile operation.

details.description: Additional details about the clone operation.

id.description: ID of the newly created (cloned) profile.

InvalidQueryParamError.description: Error when a request query parameter has an invalid value.

param_name.description: Name of the query parameter with invalid data.

CloneProfileInvalidIdErrorResponse.description: Error when the profile ID in the clone profile request path is invalid or already deleted.

CloneProfileInvalidCreateRequestErrorRes.description: Error response when clone profile request payload validation fails (missing mandatory fields).

CloneProfileDuplicateProfileNameErrorRes.description: Error response when the requested cloned profile name conflicts with an existing profile name.

CloneProfileLicenseLimitExceededErrorRes.description: Error response when cloning a profile exceeds the allowed license/profile limit.

CloneProfileInvalidProfileNameSpecialCha.description: Error response when the cloned profile name contains disallowed special characters.

profiles.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error pointing to an invalid 'name' value in the clone request.

items.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error pointing to an invalid 'name' value in the clone request.

details.description: Details pointing to the invalid field.

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field.

json_path.description: JSONPath to the invalid field in the request payload.

CloneProfileCannotBeClonedErrorResponse.description: Error response when the specified profile cannot be cloned.

profiles.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error indicating the clone operation is not permitted.

items.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error indicating the clone operation is not permitted.

DeleteProfileInvalidIdErrorResponse.description: Error response when the profile id in the delete profile request path is invalid or already deleted.

DeleteProfileInvalidActionErrorResponse.description: Error response when the action given for delete profile is invalid.

details.description: Additional error details (empty for this error).

DeleteProfileSystemProfileNotAllowedErro.description: Error response when attempting to delete a system profile (not allowed).

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path segment containing the profile id.

UpdateProfileDuplicateDataErrorResponse.description: Error response when updating a profile fails due to duplicate profile name.

profiles.description: Per-profile errors for the update request.

items.description: Per-profile DUPLICATE_DATA error indicating the profile name already exists.

details.description: Details pointing to the duplicated field and existing record id.

api_name.description: API name of the duplicated field.

json_path.description: JSONPath to the duplicated field in the request payload.

id.description: Existing profile id that conflicts with the requested value.

UpdateProfileInvalidProfileNameSpecialCh.description: Error response when the profile name contains disallowed special characters during update.

profiles.description: Per-profile errors for the update request.

items.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error for an invalid profile name value.

details.description: Details pointing to the invalid field.

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field.

enum: Profile name should not contain the following special character(s) : #, %, &, (, ), *, ^

UpdateProfileInvalidActionErrorResponse.description: Error response when the action given in the update profile request is invalid.

profiles.description: Per-profile errors for the update request.

items.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error indicating an invalid action.

details.description: Empty details object for invalid action error.

UpdateProfileInvalidPermissionIdErrorRes.description: Error response when an invalid permission id is provided in profiles[].permissions_details during update.

profiles.description: Per-profile errors for the update request.

items.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error indicating an invalid permission id.

details.description: Details pointing to the invalid permission id field.

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field.

json_path.description: JSONPath to the invalid permission id in the request payload.

UpdateProfileInvalidPermissionsDetailsDa.description: Error response when permissions_details is of an unexpected datatype in update profile request.

api_name.description: API name of the field with datatype mismatch.

UpdateProfileChildPermissionParentDisabl.description: Error response when attempting to enable a child permission while its parent permission is disabled.

profiles.description: Per-profile errors for the update request.

items.description: Per-profile INVALID_DATA error indicating parent permission is disabled.

details.description: Details pointing to the permission id causing the rule violation.

api_name.description: API name of the invalid field.

json_path.description: JSONPath to the permission id in the request payload.

enum: Child permission can not be enabled, since its parent permission is disabled

UpdateProfilePermissionNotAllowedErrorRe.description: Error response when a permission id in permissions[] cannot be updated.

permissions.description: Per-permission errors for the update request.

items.description: Per-permission NOT_ALLOWED error indicating the permission id is not updatable.

details.description: Details pointing to the permission id field.

json_path.description: JSONPath to the field in the request payload.

UpdateProfileSystemProfileNotAllowedErro.description: Error response when attempting to update a system profile (not allowed).

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path segment containing the profile id.

enum: the id given seems to be invalid or already deleted

ProfileSectionCategoryModule.description: Module reference used inside profile sections/categories.

UnauthorizedResponse.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failed or invalid credentials

ForbiddenResponse.description: Forbidden - User does not have permission to clone layouts

InternalServerErrorResponse.description: Internal Server Error - An unexpected error occurred on the server
